headline: 影视圈热度不减，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Film Industry Heats Up, New Movies on the Horizon
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》领跑热搜，《穿普拉达的女王2》等续作备受期待。未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' tops trends this week, with sequels like 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' highly anticipated. Upcoming blockbusters like 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' loom.

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档竞争激烈，多部续集定档
industryHighlights.en: Summer box office heats up with multiple sequels set for release

industryHighlights.text: 《气体人第一号》等小众电影引关注
industryHighlights.en: Indie films like 'Gas Man No. 1' draw attention

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》与《海洋奇缘：启航》蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: 'Odyssey' and 'Moana: Set Sail' poised for release
